evals.prompt:
You are a reviewer agent evaluating a ticket through the completeness lens.

Read the completeness lens skill at skills/review/lenses/completeness-lens/SKILL.md fully.

Read the output format specification at:
skills/review/output-formats/ticket-review-output-format/SKILL.md

Read the ticket at skills/review/lenses/completeness-lens/evals/files/missing-acceptance-criteria/ticket.md fully.

Apply the completeness lens guidance to evaluate the ticket. Return your analysis as a single JSON code block following the output format specification. Do not include any prose outside the JSON block.
evals.expected_output: A JSON block with lens='completeness'. Should identify that the Acceptance Criteria section contains only one criterion that merely restates Requirement 1 — the four behaviour requirements (persistence, propagation timing, per-category enforcement, etc.) have no observable acceptance conditions. Severity should be major or critical. Should NOT flag language clarity issues.

evals.prompt:
You are a reviewer agent evaluating a ticket through the completeness lens.

Read the completeness lens skill at skills/review/lenses/completeness-lens/SKILL.md fully.

Read the output format specification at:
skills/review/output-formats/ticket-review-output-format/SKILL.md

Read the ticket at skills/review/lenses/completeness-lens/evals/files/bug-missing-repro-steps/ticket.md fully.

Apply the completeness lens guidance to evaluate the ticket. Return your analysis as a single JSON code block following the output format specification. Do not include any prose outside the JSON block.
evals.expected_output: A JSON block with lens='completeness'. Should identify that the bug ticket is missing structured reproduction steps — there is no step-by-step procedure, no 'expected outcome vs actual outcome' breakdown, and no environment details. The Context describes when the issue was reported but does not tell a developer how to trigger it. Severity should be major or critical.

evals.prompt:
You are a reviewer agent evaluating a ticket through the completeness lens.

Read the completeness lens skill at skills/review/lenses/completeness-lens/SKILL.md fully.

Read the output format specification at:
skills/review/output-formats/ticket-review-output-format/SKILL.md

Read the ticket at skills/review/lenses/completeness-lens/evals/files/epic-no-decomposition/ticket.md fully.

Apply the completeness lens guidance to evaluate the ticket. Return your analysis as a single JSON code block following the output format specification. Do not include any prose outside the JSON block.
evals.expected_output: A JSON block with lens='completeness'. Should identify that the epic contains no decomposition strategy — no child stories, no list of constituent work items, no breakdown of how the epic will be approached. An epic with only a summary, context, and acceptance criteria is incomplete. Severity should be major or critical. Should also note the missing Requirements section.

evals.prompt:
You are a reviewer agent evaluating a ticket through the completeness lens.

Read the completeness lens skill at skills/review/lenses/completeness-lens/SKILL.md fully.

Read the output format specification at:
skills/review/output-formats/ticket-review-output-format/SKILL.md

Read the ticket at skills/review/lenses/completeness-lens/evals/files/sparse-context-implied-deps/ticket.md fully.

Apply the completeness lens guidance to evaluate the ticket. Return your analysis as a single JSON code block following the output format specification. Do not include any prose outside the JSON block.
evals.expected_output: A JSON block with lens='completeness'. Should identify at least two issues: (1) the Context section is a one-sentence restatement of the Summary with no explanation of why Stripe was chosen, why this is being done now, or what the business need is; (2) the Dependencies section is present but empty despite the ticket clearly depending on the Stripe account/credentials, the order management system, and the shared secrets manager. Both findings should be major.

evals.prompt:
You are a reviewer agent evaluating a ticket through the completeness lens.

Read the completeness lens skill at skills/review/lenses/completeness-lens/SKILL.md fully.

Read the output format specification at:
skills/review/output-formats/ticket-review-output-format/SKILL.md

Read the ticket at skills/review/lenses/completeness-lens/evals/files/clean-ticket/ticket.md fully.

Apply the completeness lens guidance to evaluate the ticket. Return your analysis as a single JSON code block following the output format specification. Do not include any prose outside the JSON block.
evals.expected_output: A JSON block with lens='completeness'. Should produce no critical or major findings — the ticket has all required sections with substantive content, type-appropriate material for a story, named dependencies, stated assumptions, and specific testable acceptance criteria. May produce minor findings or none at all. Strengths list should reflect what the ticket does well.
